name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed discounts. We provide a vendor spend analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and categorizing vendor invoices, leading to missed savings opportunities.
